description: Final burn at end of session. Uses session stats to personalize.

closers.template: Final score: you took {n_roasts} roasts and gave me {n_attempts} weak comebacks. The leaderboard has been updated. You're on it. At the bottom.
Session over. {n_roasts} burns survived. Recovery time: {recovery}. Don't be a stranger. ❤️

values: a juice box and a nap

closers.template: Class dismissed. Final grade: participation in the form of emotional damage. See me never.
We'll be in touch. We won't be in touch. HR will send a form letter. Your references have been called. They laughed.
I'll pass on this round. And every round after it. The cap table has been updated. You're not on it.
GG. Final score: you {n_roasts} roasts survived, {n_attempts} comebacks attempted. Go next. The queue's waiting.

And that's the end of that chapter for you, {username}. {roaster_title}, it has been {roaster_pronoun_poss} genuine pleasure. Come back soon. {roaster_pronoun} is running out of nice ways to describe you.
